headline: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Could Be 7% Overvalued After Nextrade Korea Launch
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) is drawing fresh attention after opening access to select Korean equities through Nextrade, South Korea's first Alternative Trading System. This move expands trading hours, liquidity options, and its global brokerage reach. See our latest analysis for Interactive Brokers Group. The Nextrade launch comes after a strong run in Interactive Brokers Group’s stock, with a 30-day share price return of 12.05% and a 90-day share price return of 30.78%, while the 1-year...

headline: Goldman Sachs vs. Interactive Brokers: Which Financial Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Goldman Sachs dominates institutional finance with $3.6 trillion in assets, while Interactive Brokers scales globally with 5 million accounts and zero debt.
